name: AVISTA CORP
business: Avista Corp., through Avista Utilities, provides electric and natural gas distribution services to retail customers in parts of eastern Washington, northern Idaho, and northeastern and southwestern Oregon. Through Alaska Electric Light and Power Company (AEL&P), it is the sole utility providing electrical energy in Juneau, Alaska. The company also engages in wholesale sales of electricity and natural gas.

exposures.sentence: Avista Utilities provides electric and natural gas distribution services to retail customers in parts of eastern Washington, northern Idaho, and northeastern and southwestern Oregon.
We have an electric transmission system of approximately 700 miles of 230 kV line and approximately 1,600 miles of 115 kV line.
We have exclusive rights to the capacity of Palouse Wind, a wind generation project developed, owned and managed by an unrelated third-party and located in Whitman County, Washington.
a project for 100 MW, 4-hour Battery Energy Storage System, to be built and transferred to the Company in eastern Washington with a target date in 2028
Cyberattacks, ransomware, terrorism or other malicious acts could disrupt our businesses and have a negative impact on our results of operations and cash flows.

catalysts.event: Transfer of ownership in Colstrip Units 3 and 4 to NorthWestern
catalysts.sentence: on January 1, 2026, the transaction to transfer our 15 percent ownership in Colstrip Units 3 and 4 to NorthWestern closed.

catalysts.event: First stage of Rathdrum CT upgrade adding capacity
catalysts.sentence: This upgrade will occur in two stages with the first occurring in 2027 and the second in 2029

catalysts.event: Second stage of Rathdrum CT upgrade
catalysts.sentence: This upgrade will occur in two stages with the first occurring in 2027 and the second in 2029

catalysts.event: 100 MW battery energy storage system target
catalysts.sentence: a project for 100 MW, 4-hour Battery Energy Storage System, to be built and transferred to the Company in eastern Washington with a target date in 2028

catalysts.event: 200 MW wind PPA from Montana target
catalysts.sentence: a PPA for approximately 200 MW of wind power from Montana that utilizes our share of the Colstrip Transmission System with a target date in 2029
and the addition of approximately 40 MW of Demand Response Programs that will recruit residential, commercial and industrial customers within our service territory, beginning in 2026.

catalysts.event: Filed multi-year rate plan (MYRP) with WUTC
catalysts.sentence: On January 16, 2026, we filed an MYRP with the WUTC.
